subtasks.description: Query budget allocation by product category with YoY/QoQ trends, cost variance analysis, and category-level metrics (total spend, growth rate, variance %)
Analyze budget trends output to classify categories by efficiency/growth, identify reallocation opportunities, and generate prioritized reallocation strategy with justification

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks are the minimum needed: (1) sql_gen to aggregate budget and cost trend data across product categories with time-series metrics — this is a mid-tier task requiring multi-table joins and window functions for trend analysis; (2) cross_recon to synthesize the budget data into strategic reallocation recommendations with classification of categories by performance and financial impact — mid tier because it involves multi-signal analysis (spend, growth, variance) and decision generation. No policy_action is included because the query asks for strategy recommendation, not governance/compliance approval. No separate extraction or multitool steps are needed; the sql_gen covers all data retrieval in one complex query, and cross_recon handles the analytical reasoning as part of its core function.

output.sql: WITH quarterly AS (SELECT product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2023-01-01' GROUP BY product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter), with_trends AS (SELECT product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, spend, LAG(spend, 4) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) AS spend_yoy, LAG(spend, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) AS spend_qoq, AVG(spend) OVER (PARTITION BY product) AS avg_spend, STDDEV(spend) OVER (PARTITION BY product) AS stddev_spend FROM quarterly) SELECT product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, spend AS total_spend, spend_yoy, spend_qoq, CASE WHEN spend_yoy > 0 THEN ROUND(((spend - spend_yoy) / spend_yoy) * 100, 2) END AS yoy_growth_pct, CASE WHEN spend_qoq > 0 THEN ROUND(((spend - spend_qoq) / spend_qoq) * 100, 2) END AS qoq_growth_pct, ROUND(avg_spend, 2) AS avg_quarterly_spend, CASE WHEN avg_spend > 0 THEN ROUND(((spend - avg_spend) / avg_spend) * 100, 2) END AS variance_pct, ROUND(stddev_spend, 2) AS spend_volatility FROM with_trends ORDER BY product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter
